_comment: csuite server config — the slim boot file at csuite.json. Holds ONLY infrastructure knobs that must exist before SQLite can open: storage paths, HTTPS, Web Push (VAPID), federated JWT, and file-upload caps. Team identity, members, permission presets, bearer tokens, and TOTP secrets ALL live in the database — manage them via `csuite team`, `csuite member`, `csuite presets`, the REST API, or MCP tools, NOT by editing this file. Hand-editing is supported only as a rescue path for deployment plumbing. The `webPush` VAPID keypair is auto-generated on first boot and written back here; add an optional `jwt` block { issuer, jwksUrl, audience } only when federating to a hosted control plane.
